short_desc: For those wanting stylish, spacious living, Mt Yotei views and a quiet lower village location, the brand-new Hirafu Woods simply can't be beaten. With 4 bedrooms plus a tatami room which can accommodate an extra two adults, this 3-story apartment fits 10 and is perfect for families or large groups of friends who want to do Niseko the right way. Wake up to a view of the rising sun behind Mt Yotei. Full kitchen perfect for preparing your family meals. After a day skiing Niseko's famous slopes, relax in the enormous bathtub while taking in the Yotei view. Socialise in style in the spacious living room with a premium dining table, designer cutlery, crockery, modern furniture and a huge smart TV with Netflix and Apple TV.
